# summary

**Instance Property**

A descriptive summary of a movie or show.

## Declaration

```swift
var summary: String? { get set }
```

## Discussion

The system displays the summary only in the [doc://com.apple.tvservices/documentation/TVServices/TVTopShelfCarouselContent/Style-swift.enum/details] style.

## Specifying the Item Details

- **contextTitle**: A localized string describing why the item is shown in the top shelf.
- **genre**: The genre assigned to the movie or show.
- **duration**: The length of the movie or show, in seconds.
- **creationDate**: The original release date of the content.
